headlines.description: — CJ McCollum posted season highs with 46 points and 10 made 3-pointers, and the Washington Wizards never trailed en route to a 132-113 win over the Atlanta Hawks on Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: McCollum scores 46 as Wizards snap 14-game skid with 132-113 win over Hawks

headlines.description: — Anthony Black scored 27 of his career-high 31 points in the first half, Franz Wagner added 21 points and the Orlando Magic routed the injury-depleted Philadelphia 76ers 144-103 in an NBA Cup game on Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Anthony Black nets career-high 31 points, leads Orlando to 144-103 win over Philadelphia

events.name: LA Clippers at Los Angeles Lakers

headlines.description: — Luka Doncic had 43 points, 13 assists and nine rebounds, and LeBron James added 25 points in the Los Angeles Lakers' fifth consecutive victory, 135-118 over the Los Angeles Clippers on Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Luka, LeBron lead Lakers past Clippers 135-118 for 5th straight win, clinching their NBA Cup group
